title: Bank notes: Resources for media - Bank of Canada
content:
## Bank notes: Resources for media
This section features reference materials, survey results and more to help journalists research and report on Canada’s bank notes.

## Research and reports
Get quick access to our research and reports on bank notes.

## Reference materials to download

### Brochure – Vertical $10
Basic information on the design and security features of the vertical $10 bank note.

### Canada 150 Bank Note Security Features Fact Sheet
A summary of the security features on the Canada 150 commemorative bank note.

### Frontiers Series Fact Sheets
A summary of key information about the Frontiers series bank notes rolled into one handy document.

### Frontiers Series Leaflet
Basic information on the security features of polymer bank notes.
